content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.60% with IT sector crashing -3.57% (led by HCLTECH -9.75%), VIX up 3.76% to 18.19 signals rising fear. However, defensive rotation into FMCG, Power, and PSU Banks is playing out well — several of my holdings are in the right sectors. With 48% already deployed and positions showing a net small loss intraday, focus is on setting SLs/targets for existing book rather than adding new risk this late in the session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24350,
      "nifty_resistance": 24550
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "new_target": 89.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target not reached in 10 trading days or if breaks below Rs 76.50 (below recent swing & SMA-ish support). HDFC Sec TP Rs 90 is the anchor.",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (+35% PAT), best-in-class asset quality (NNPA 0.13%), PSU Bank sector leader. Stock made 52-wk high today then faded intraday — some profit-booking expected. Setting SL at Rs 76.50 (~4.9% below entry, below today's low of 79.81 and giving room for volatility) and target at Rs 89 (HDFC target Rs 90). Risk-reward ~1.7:1. Equity raise dilution is a medium-term overhang but near-term momentum and sector leadership justify holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "new_target": 1075.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit in 8 days if target not hit. Trail SL to breakeven if stock closes above Rs 1020.",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 beat (+19% PAT), retail book +16% YoY, GNPA improved to 0.93%. Stock up ~9% today — momentum intact but extended. SL at Rs 955 (~3% below entry, just below VWAP/today's low Rs 978 with buffer). Target Rs 1,075 offers ~9% upside, RR ~3:1. NII growth lagging loan book growth is a margin flag — keeping hold period tight at 8 days."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 120.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit in 15 days if target not hit. Defensive hedge — hold regardless of small P&L unless SL hit.",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge against rising VIX (18.19) and weak IT sector. Gold saw a 2-day correction but structural drivers (Middle East risk, Fed dovishness expectations) intact. SL at Rs 120 (~4% below entry, below recent Apr 9 low of 122.20 as a structural support). Target Rs 135 modest ~8% upside. Low conviction but valid portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 1595.00,
      "new_target": 1780.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target not hit within 12 days or before Q4 results May 2026 (whichever earlier). Trail SL to Rs 1640 if stock closes above Rs 1720.",
      "reasoning": "Power sector momentum strong on heatwave/demand thesis. Stock broke above prior swing high today on 2.3x volume. SL at Rs 1,595 (~3.3% below entry, below today's low Rs 1616). Target Rs 1,780 near broker TPs Rs 1,880-1,900. RR ~2.4:1. Nabha acquisition adds optionality."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "new_target": 1495.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit in 10 days or if breaks below Rs 1360 (near VWAP/intraday breakout base).",
      "reasoning": "Blowout Q4 — revenue +22.6%, EBITDA margin 26.3%, best in 9 years. Gapped to fresh 52-wk high. Defensive FMCG in risk-off environment. SL at Rs 1,360 (~3.5% below entry, below the gap-up base). Target Rs 1,495 (~6% upside from entry, conservative given extended valuation). RR ~1.7:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 1010.00,
      "new_target": 1120.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "time_exit_plan": "Key event April 27 board meet for Q4 results. Exit before results if target not hit and confidence in beat is low.",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 pre-update: advances +25% YoY, CASA +19.6%. Banking sector leader today with relative strength (+4.87% vs Bank Nifty -0.20%). 52-wk high broken today. SL at Rs 1,010 (~3.8% below entry, below today's low Rs 1032 with buffer). Target Rs 1,120 (~6.7%). RR ~1.75:1. Results April 27 — key binary catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 650.00,
      "new_target": 745.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "time_exit_plan": "Q4 results April 29. Exit before results if in meaningful profit; otherwise ride into results with tight SL.",
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52-wk high with 3.7x volume in a weak market is high relative strength. ICICI Direct TP Rs 770. Pharma sector exempt from Trump generics tariff. SL at Rs 650 (~4.5% below entry, below today's low Rs 666). Target Rs 745 (~9%). RR ~2:1. Results catalyst April 29."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 2290.00,
      "new_target": 2510.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "time_exit_plan": "Q4 results April 30 key event. Exit ahead of results if no meaningful progress.",
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive rally playing out. Q4 results April 30 catalyst. Core fundamentals softer than Nestle but valuation and dividend defensive. SL at Rs 2,290 (~3.5% below entry, below today's open Rs 2310). Target Rs 2,510 (~5.8%). Lower conviction than Nestle so smaller RR acceptable."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "reasoning": "Core PSU bank thesis intact; SL placed below today's low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "reasoning": "Momentum intact post-earnings; SL below today's low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 120.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge against VIX spike; wider SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1595.00,
      "reasoning": "Power sector breakout on volume; SL below today's low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "reasoning": "Blowout Q4, gap-up day; SL below gap base."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1010.00,
      "reasoning": "Relative strength vs Bank Nifty; Q4 results April 27 catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 650.00,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52-wk high with massive volume; Q4 results April 29."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2290.00,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive; results April 30 catalyst."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HCLTECH: bearish, not touching — dead-cat bounce setups are low probability; let it stabilize. Avoid until clear base forms. ADANIPOWER: momentum strong but extended near 52-wk high after 21.5% in 9 sessions, and stock is on ASM — skip. ELECON: Q4 optically terrible (PAT -96%), even if non-cash; core Gear Division declining — avoid. DEEPAKNTR: +14% on below-average volume is a red flag (could be narrow-float-driven); no confirmed catalyst — avoid. NTPC: clean defensive, good candidate for future add if it pulls back to Rs 395-398 zone. GAIL: bearish research view + sector weak; skip.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Portfolio is 48% deployed across 8 positions spanning PSU Bank, NBFC, FMCG (2), Power, Pharma, Private Bank, and Gold ETF — reasonably diversified for a risk-off market. With VIX at 18.19 and IT sector melting down, defensive positioning is appropriate. Not adding new positions today given: (1) time of day (14:38, 51 min to close), (2) several positions have imminent earnings catalysts next week (AUBANK Apr 27, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30), (3) all existing positions need SL/target discipline first. Sector exposure check: FMCG ~8%, Power ~6%, Banks ~13%, NBFC ~8%, Pharma ~5%, Gold ~5% — all within 35% sector cap. No single position exceeds 20%. Cash buffer healthy at 52%."
}
